query: brachytherapy artifact reduction CT imaging metallic implants

results.title: [Usefulness of Metal Artifact-reduced Reconstruction for Image-guided Brachytherapy for Cervical Cancer].
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 35046224. 2022/01/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: This study aims to evaluate the effectiveness of combining virtual 
monochromatic images (VMI) with metal artifact reduction (MAR) algorithms in 
reducing metal artifacts in cervical cancer patients undergoing intracavitary 
brachytherapy.
MATERIALS AND METHODS: Fifty cervical cancer patients scheduled for 
intracavitary brachytherapy underwent spectral computed tomography (CT) images. 
VMI + MAR/no-MAR were reconstructed at energies ranging fro
